title: Villager Trading Station
body:
#### Villager Trading Station


A simple block to automatically trade with villagers
 

#### Usage

 
Get a piece of paper and click on a villager trade while having the paper in your cursor, which will turn it into a quote. Then craft a villager trading station and use the quote on the station to lock it in. Items then are to be then piped into the station, and once a villager finds the station and completes the trade, items will be placed into the output buffer which can be piped out


Click on the trade

![Click](https://i.imgur.com/pNvIZxY.png)

You will be given a quote for that trade. Place it into a trading station to start trading

![Quote now has a tooltip](https://i.imgur.com/mTrv0wt.png)
 

Right click the station for a management GUI

![GUI](https://i.imgur.com/mFwxJvE.png)
